message:
refactor: remove native-static flow (WAMR AOT is faster)

Remove native-static target and universal-runtime since WAMR AOT
provides better performance. Keep wasm-standalone and wasm-browser
for portability to other WASI runtimes.

Removed:
- src/native_main_static.zig
- src/universal_main.zig
- native-static build target
- universal-runtime build target
